scope: ACL 2027 supplement theory failure-mode map iteration

local_visual_review.notes: The page is no longer a plain theory text page. The full-width map ties appearance perturbation, observable evidence, static metric movement, VLM boxes, and navigation outcomes into a single interpretive guide. The residual risk is small in-figure label text, but the panel is usable as a reading map rather than primary numerical evidence.

verification.targeted_red: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "failure_mode_map" failed before implementation because the source include and registry entry were absent.
verification.targeted_green: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "failure_mode_map" passed after implementation and density iteration: 2 passed, 46 deselected.
verification.build: make -C paper acl27-supplement passed and produced paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf with 42 A4 pages.
verification.pdf_text_scan: pdftotext found the new Figure S23 failure-mode caption and did not find the old red-material caption tokens, fig_vlm_grounding_cases, or private local paths.

claim_boundary.notes: The map composes already registered evidence and render crops. It does not introduce a new metric, VLM prediction run, material-effect population statistic, or navigation experiment.
